hooks.command: jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; [ ! -f "$f" ] && exit 0; lines=$(wc -l < "$f" 2>/dev/null | tr -d " " || echo 0); if [ "$lines" -gt 800 ]; then jq -nc --arg f "$f" --arg n "$lines" "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PostToolUse\", additionalContext:\"⚠️ \(\$f) exceeds 800 lines (\(\$n)). Project policy: split files > 800 lines. Consider extracting helpers/types to sibling files.\"}}"; fi; }
